title: Legacy Skins: Doctor Who
description: A skin pack for the "Legacy Skins" mod that adds many skins related to the show Doctor Who!
body:
![The Doctor(s)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/893feda9e391189328363fc4304199af7ffa7c2f_0.webp)
## What is this?
Great question! This resource pack is an add-on to the "[Legacy Skins](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy-skins)" mod. The Legacy Skins mod is an add-on to the [Legacy4J](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/legacy-minecraft) mod. When using these two mods together it brings the classic look & feel of Minecraft Legacy Console edition.

## What is in this Skin Pack?
This skin pack adds a skin for every portrayol of "The Doctor" from Doctor Who, it also adds a large amount of the various companions from the show.

## Where can I get more Skin Packs?
Please join the Legacy4J Discord server for more information.

# CREDITS
All credits to the skins go to CosmicMenace & LocalToybot
